category: Devices for Physically Creating Written Marks on a Surface
explanation: Pen, Pencil, Typewriter, and Printing Press are all tools or machines designed to physically transfer ink or graphite to create written or printed text and images on a tangible surface. A Display Screen, however, shows text digitally and does not physically create marks on a surface.

All items listed are among the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World. However, the Hanging Gardens, Colossus of Rhodes, Temple of Artemis, and Statue of Zeus have all been destroyed or lost to history. The Great Pyramid of Giza is the only one of the original seven wonders that still largely stands today.

Shattered, Ruined, Fractured, and Destroyed all describe conditions where something is significantly damaged or broken. Immaculate means perfectly clean, neat, or tidy, and free from any flaws or damage, making it the opposite of the others.
